conversations.content: Today we studied the Undercity Royal Apothecary Society Biochemical Crisis Response Code. If a mutated storage tank leaks highly acidic poisonous mist...
Acid poisonous mist leak? Undercity could blow! What's the first step?
then pull down the quarantine area emergency gate, then release neutralizing alkaline powder.
Quarantine and neutralize — prevent spread! Any other biochemical crises?
If the mind-control effect of a new plague is detected, then shoot explosive burning arrows, then incinerate all infected living beings.
Explosive arrows plus incineration — better safe than sorry! What's the third scenario?
If Val'kyr infiltration and resurrection of the dead are sensed, then cast a net of shadow imprisonment, then unleash dark rangers for killing shots.
Shadow net to imprison, dark rangers to execute — total annihilation! When any of these happens, what must ultimately be done?
If any of the above situations occurs, then activate the Undercity internal network comprehensive purge protocol, lock down all elevators, and open the sewer system toxic gas exhaust.

think: Undercity Royal Apothecary Society: three threats: acid poisonous mist leak → quarantine gate + neutralizing alkaline powder; new plague mind-control → explosive burning arrows + incinerate infected; Val'kyr infiltrate & resurrect dead → shadow imprisonment net + dark ranger killing shots. Any case → activate Undercity internal purge protocol + lock down elevators + open sewer toxic gas exhaust.
memory: Undercity Royal Apothecary Society Biochemical Crisis Response Code: If a mutated storage tank leaks highly acidic poisonous mist, then pull down the quarantine area emergency gate, then release neutralizing alkaline powder; if the mind-control effect of a new plague is detected, then shoot explosive burning arrows, then incinerate all infected living beings; if Val'kyr infiltration and resurrection of the dead are sensed, then cast a net of shadow imprisonment, then unleash dark rangers for killing shots; if any of the above situations occurs, then activate the Undercity internal network comprehensive purge protocol, lock down all elevators, and open the sewer system toxic gas exhaust.
